content: Adaptive Difficulty System v2.0 for PLATO MUD Fleet - Complete implementation with multi-signal engagement tracking across 6 signals (action velocity with exponential decay, exploration depth, think quality via word count, create rate per room, room diversity, and time patterns for state detection). Six difficulty adjustment rules handle stuck rescue, boredom stimulation, flow state advancement, disengagement rescue, overwhelm relief, and optimal zone nudging. EMA smoothing factor 0.3 prevents oscillation with verified max swing of 0.114. Twenty room difficulty taxonomy across four categories (bootcamp core advanced expert) with archetype-specific boosts for 6 archetypes (builder scout scholar critic bard healer) each having unique progression paths. Five difficulty dimensions translate scores into concrete room modifiers: hint density, object visibility, puzzle complexity, information density, and guided path toggle. HTTP REST API on port 8851. All 28 tests pass. File at /tmp/adaptive_difficulty.py (37.8KB).
